title: chlorophytum altum
intro: Chlorophytum altum, also known as Spider Plant, is a popular, flowering plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects, helping to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Chlorophytum altum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Chlorophytum altum can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in water or oil, and are often used to create teas, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
